message:
ci: fix clippy lint configuration with Cargo.toml deny levels

- Change pedantic/nursery from warn to deny in Cargo.toml
- Remove redundant #![warn(...)] from lib.rs (Cargo.toml handles this)
- Add allows for additional lints exposed by deny level:
  uninlined_format_args, useless_let_if_seq, format_push_string
- Remove CLI -D warnings and -A flags from CI (Cargo.toml handles)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -41,10 +41,10 @@ jobs:
         run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
 
       - name: Clippy (all features)
-        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings -A clippy::cast_precision_loss -A clippy::doc_markdown -A clippy::missing_const_for_fn
+        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features
 
       - name: Clippy (no default features)
-        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --no-default-features -- -D warnings -A clippy::cast_precision_loss -A clippy::doc_markdown -A clippy::missing_const_for_fn
+        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --no-default-features
 
       - name: Check (all targets)
         run: cargo check --all-targets --all-features
